Normalize the given ML Engine job_id by prefixing with 'z_' when it starts with a digit or a template and by sanitizing non-alphanumeric characters outside templates.

Arguments:
    job_id (str): input ML Engine job identifier to normalize; may start with a digit or contain template blocks in the form {{...}}. The function prefixes 'z_' when needed and replaces non-alphanumeric characters outside templates with underscores, preserving template blocks.
